labels.analysis: The MCP Server "Citedy SEO Agent" provides 53 tools for web search & research tasks.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Web Search & Research" assigned based on tool names and descriptions.
labels.custom_label: Web Search & Research - Citedy SEO Agent

tools.name: article.generate
tools.description: Generate a new article using the autopilot flow and current workspace settings.

source_urls.description: Source URLs to base the article on (1-3)

language.description: Article language code, e.g. en, es, de

persona.description: Writing persona slug from available personas

audio.description: Generate audio voice-over for the article

wait_for_completion.description: Wait synchronously for article completion before returning

tools.name: article.get
tools.description: Get queued article generation status or final generated article result by ID.

tools.name: article.list
tools.description: List previously generated articles for the current workspace.

tools.name: leadmagnet.generate
tools.description: Start lead magnet generation (checklist/swipe/framework) and return polling instructions.

generate_images.description: Generate cover images for lead magnet

tools.name: leadmagnet.get
tools.description: Fetch lead magnet status/result by ID.

tools.name: leadmagnet.publish
tools.description: Publish a lead magnet by ID.

tools.name: leadmagnet.archive
tools.description: Archive a lead magnet by ID.

tools.name: scout.x
tools.description: Run X/Twitter scout analysis. Returns processing status — poll scout.x.result for results.

tools.name: scout.x.result
tools.description: Get X scout run status and results by run ID.

tools.name: scout.reddit
tools.description: Run Reddit scout analysis. Returns processing status — poll scout.reddit.result for results.

tools.name: scout.reddit.result
tools.description: Get Reddit scout run status and results by run ID.

tools.name: gaps.generate
tools.description: Generate SEO/GEO content gap opportunities.

tools.name: gaps.list
tools.description: List saved content gaps.

tools.name: adapt.generate
tools.description: Generate social adaptations for an article.

article_id.description: UUID of the article to adapt

include_ref_link.description: Include reference link to original article

tools.name: ingest.create
tools.description: Create an ingestion job from a source URL.

url.description: Source URL to ingest (YouTube, web, PDF, audio)

callback_url.description: Optional HTTPS webhook URL for completion notification

tools.name: ingest.get
tools.description: Get ingestion job status/result by ID.

tools.name: ingest.content.get
tools.description: Fetch extracted content payload for a completed ingestion job.

tools.name: session.create
tools.description: Create and start an autopilot session.

categories.description: Content categories for the autopilot session

problems.description: Pain points or problems to address in content

tools.name: social.publish
tools.description: Publish, schedule, or cancel social adaptation publishing.

adaptationId.description: UUID of the social adaptation to publish

action.description: Publish action: now, schedule, or cancel

accountId.description: UUID of the connected social account

tools.name: schedule.list
tools.description: List upcoming article/post/social schedule timeline.

tools.name: schedule.gaps
tools.description: List schedule gaps for upcoming days.

days.description: Number of upcoming days to check, 1-30

tools.name: ingest.batch
tools.description: Create ingestion jobs in batch mode for multiple URLs.

urls.description: Array of 1-20 source URLs to ingest in batch

callback_url.description: Optional HTTPS webhook URL for batch completion

tools.name: competitors.discover
tools.description: Discover competitors by keyword set.

tools.name: competitors.scout
tools.description: Analyze a competitor domain.

language.description: Content language code, e.g. en, es, de

tools.name: webhooks.register
tools.description: Register webhook endpoint for agent events.

tools.name: webhooks.list
tools.description: List webhook endpoints for current agent.

tools.name: webhooks.deliveries
tools.description: List webhook delivery attempts.

tools.name: webhooks.delete
tools.description: Delete a webhook endpoint by ID.

tools.name: agent.me
tools.description: Return agent profile, balances and limits.

tools.name: agent.health
tools.description: Return infrastructure health checks for agent platform.

tools.name: agent.status
tools.description: Return actionable operational status snapshot (credits, socials, schedule, knowledge, content).

tools.name: settings.get
tools.description: Get current agent settings.

tools.name: personas.list
tools.description: List available writing personas.

tools.name: products.create
tools.description: Upload product knowledge document.

content.description: Full product description or document text

tools.name: products.list
tools.description: List product knowledge documents.

tools.name: products.delete
tools.description: Delete product knowledge document by ID.

tools.name: products.search
tools.description: Search product knowledge documents.

query.description: Semantic search query against product knowledge base

tools.name: seo.meta_tags.check
tools.description: Analyze meta tags for a target page URL.

tools.name: seo.headings.check
tools.description: Analyze heading hierarchy (H1-H6) for a page.

tools.name: seo.links.analyze
tools.description: Analyze internal/external links and link attributes.

tools.name: seo.internal_links.plan
tools.description: Plan internal linking opportunities from source URL and target URLs/sitemap.

url.description: Source page URL for internal linking analysis

targetUrls.description: Array of target URLs to find linking opportunities

sitemapUrl.description: Optional sitemap URL to discover additional pages

tools.name: seo.og.preview
tools.description: Extract Open Graph and Twitter card preview metadata.

tools.name: seo.schema.validate
tools.description: Validate JSON-LD schema markup for a page.

tools.name: seo.robots.check
tools.description: Check robots.txt availability and parsed directives.

tools.name: seo.sitemap.check
tools.description: Check sitemap availability and robots sitemap hints.

tools.name: seo.og_image.generate
tools.description: Generate an Open Graph image artifact and return hosted URL for brand assets.

primaryColor.description: Brand primary color in hex format #RRGGBB

tools.name: brand.scan
tools.description: Run AI brand visibility scan across major LLM providers (async, poll with brand.scan.get).

brandName.description: Brand name to scan across LLM providers

tools.name: brand.scan.get
tools.description: Get brand scan status and final result payload by scan ID.

tools.name: shorts.generate
tools.description: Generate shorts video and return poll instructions until final video URL is ready.

prompt.description: Video generation prompt describing scene, style, and action

avatar_url.description: URL of AI avatar image hosted on download.citedy.com

speech_text.description: Text the avatar will speak with lip-sync

tools.name: shorts.get
tools.description: Get shorts generation status/result by ID.

tools.name: shorts.script
tools.description: Generate short-form video script text (hook/educational/cta styles).

topic.description: Topic or subject for the video script

product_id.description: Optional product ID to reference in script

style.description: Script style: hook, educational, or cta

language.description: Language code, e.g. en, es, de

tools.name: shorts.avatar
tools.description: Generate an AI avatar image for shorts and return hosted avatar URL.

tools.name: shorts.merge
tools.description: Merge 2-4 short clips, apply subtitle phrases, and return final video URL.

video_urls.description: Array of 2-4 video URLs to merge

text.description: Subtitle text for this video segment

phrases.description: Subtitle text for each video segment
